chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4932 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.22569/2023. 3. For hearing of main case. 30.04.2025 Mr. Manzar Hussain Memon, advocate for the petitioner. Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for the respondent No.2. Mr. Irfan Ali Shaikh, advocate holding brief for Mr. Aamir Ali Shaikh, advocate for the respondent No.3. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Tariq Aziz, Assistant Collector, MCC Appraisement SAPT. It is jointly stated that provisional release has been ordered herein, however, the matter is now pending in the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal. It is sought that the petition be disposed of with directions that fate of the security shall be outcome of the relevant appeal. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
